title: Windows keyboard tips and tricks
license_note: Screenshots from support.microsoft.com. Confirm redistribution with your legal team before use in a shipped product.

steps.text: During text entry, press Windows key + . (period). The emoji keyboard appears.
Select an emoji with the mouse or keep typing to search through the available emojis for one you like.
For more ways to express yourself, choose from GIFs and Kaomoji too!
